vault_name.description: Name of the backup vault to store the backup in.

name.description: The resource name of the backup. Needs to be unique per location.

description.description: A description of the backup with 2048 characters or less. Requests with longer descriptions will be rejected.

source_volume.description: ID of volumes this backup belongs to. Format: `projects/{{projects_id}}/locations/{{location}}/volumes/{{name}}``

labels.description: Labels as key value pairs. Example: `{ "owner": "Bob", "department": "finance", "purpose": "testing" }`. **Note**: This field is non-authoritative, and will only manage the labels present in your configuration. Please refer to the field `effective_labels` for all of the labels present on the resource.

source_snapshot.description: If specified, backup will be created from the given snapshot. If not specified, there will be a new snapshot taken to initiate the backup creation. Format: `projects/{{projectId}}/locations/{{location}}/volumes/{{volumename}}/snapshots/{{snapshotname}}``

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
